name: Morrigan
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Slayer Champion
factionTrait.text: A slayer moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Frost Forged
uniqueTraits.text: Morrigan gains a +2 bonus for boons instead of a +1 bonus.

ultimate.name: Flash Freeze
ultimate.text: All enemies within range gain {dodge_blight} and {move_blight}.

plotSkills.name: Forward, Minions!
plotSkills.text: Move each Cold Bones that is within range up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Frosty Glance
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {protection_blight}. Move Morrigan up to 1 hex towards the target.

clashSkills.name: Snowball's Chance
clashSkills.text: If this skill wounds its target, they gain wounds until they are knocked out.

clashSkills.name: Iceblade
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: If the target has {move_blight}, {accuracy_die_blight}, or {damage_die_blight} it gains 1 wound.

traits.name: Brain Freeze
traits.text: After an enemy model uses a skill to knock out one or more Cold Bones, the enemy model gains {dodge_blight}.

plotSkills.name: So Cool, Mistress!
plotSkills.text: If Morrigan is within range, she gains {accuracy_die_boon} or {move_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Chill Out
plotSkills.text: This skill has +1 {accuracy_die} for each Cold Bones adjacent to the target. Hit Effect: Inflict {damage_die_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Snowblade Fight!
clashSkills.text: This skill has +1 {accuracy_die} for each Cold Bones adjacent to the target.
